article_meta.title: MoneyWatch Can TrumpRx help you save money on drugs? Here's what experts say

reasoning: Severe failures: multiple attribution rule violations by flagging quoted source language as author bias, use of non-standard bias type labels, inclusion of non-textual meta critique as biasedText, and structural invalidity due to markdown code fences.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged direct quotes from sources (e.g., Anthony Wright and Yunan Ji) as bias and included Trump’s quoted statement within a flagged item.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items were not genuine author-prose bias: two were purely quoted source language and one was a meta summary rather than a text excerpt.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: The article’s author prose is largely neutral; no clear missed author-level bias instances.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed categories (Framing Bias, Selection and Omission Bias, Labeling Bias, Spin/Tone Bias) instead of the defined bias types.
